name: espocrm-ext-togare-nextcloud-bridge
releaseNotes: Story 6.0 (MINOR — alinhamento cross-module com togare-core 0.32.0): NextcloudFileStorage ganha buildUri(logicalPath):string novo retornando 'nextcloud://<logicalPath>' (Decisão #6 — método novo no FileStorageContract da togare-core; LocalDiskStorage parceira retorna 'local://<path>'). Sem mudança em put/get/exists/delete/softPurge/restore/streamWebDav. Sem schema, sem migration, sem RBAC, sem JS. Dep togare-core bumpada para >=0.32.0. +1 PHPUnit novo cobrindo buildUri. +PREVIOUS Story 5.5 0.3.0: TogareBridgeHardDeleteJob scheduled cron 0 3 * * * promove tombstones em hard-delete após 30d via togare_documento_log sem schema novo.
description: Módulo Nextcloud Bridge do Togare — camada de integração unificada Togare↔Nextcloud via WebDAV/OCS. Stories 5.1 + 5.3 + 5.5: NextcloudClientContract com 7 métodos (put/get/exists/delete/move/propfindList/resolveWebDavUrl + streamWebDav novo) + OcsApiClient (cURL + retry 3x + CB file-based, streaming via CURLOPT_FILE 1MB buffer) + NextcloudFileStorage + NextcloudPurgeableStorage + TogareBridgeHardDeleteJob. FR19/FR20/FR21 + NFR1 + NFR26.

scripts.integration-tests: node build --copy && node build --composer-install && cd site && php vendor/bin/phpunit tests/integration/Espo/Modules/TogareNextcloudBridge

author: Togare
